titleStmt.title: SII 19.458: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 458. (A.R. No. 489 of 1925.) ŚEMBIYANMAHĀDĒVI, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KAILĀSANĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa. It records an endowment, left with the Chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭas of Śembiyanmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Aḷa-nāḍu, of 158 kaḻañju of gold with the interest on which offerings were to be made to god Kailāsamuḍaiya-Mahādēva on the day of Kēṭṭai in Chittirai month of every year, being the natal star of Parāntakaṉ-Mādēvaḍigaḷ alias Śembiyaṉmahādēviyār, the queen mother of Uttama-Chōḷa. The donor whose name is not clear in the inscription, seems to have been a queen of Uttama-Chōḷa himself and to have hailed from Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastī śrī .. koppara[ kecarivarmma] ṟkku tu kaṇṭan maturāntakadevarāṉa śrī Uttama coḻadevarait tiruvayiṟuvāytta Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār śrī
parān=takaṉmātevaṭikaḷarāṉa [śrī cempiyaṉ mahā]deviyār ceytaruḷiṉa teṉkarai� Aḷaṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam cempiyaṉmahādeviccaturvedi
maṅkalattu caturvedibhaṭ śrī kayi[ lāsamuṭaiya] mahādevar śrīkoyile Ippirāṭṭiyār tirunāḷāṉa cittirait tirukke
ṭṭaiynāḷ meykkāṭṭi Uṇpatāka paṅkaḷaṉāṭuṭaiyār A peruma ṇappirāṭṭiyār Ivvūr Ūrkallāl ku(ṭ)ṭutta poṉ 100 5 10 8 Ippoṉ ṉū
ṟṟaiñpatteṇkaḻañcum Iddharmam cantrāditya(ya)vaṟ niṟkkumvaṇṇam Ippoṉ mutalaḻiyāmey Itiṉāl vanta bhogamuṇṇappeṟuvārāka vaiyttu ...
Digital edition of SII 19.458 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
